title: DEKOPRO Bicycle Torque Wrench, Ratchet, Torque Wrenches 1/2 ", 24 Teeth, 13.6-203.5 Nm ± 4%, Error Accuracy 420 mm Long, Bicycle, Car, Motorcycle
features: High Accuracy and Stable Performance: DEKOPRO torque wrench offers an accuracy of ±4% and a wide measuring range of 10-150ftlb (13.6-203.5Nm). This high precision torque wrench is ideal for repairing and maintaining vehicles, machinery and other technical equipment. Each torque wrench small is carefully calibrated and tested to ensure reliable and precise application.

Sturdy Design and Durable Materials: The DEKOPRO torque wrench bicycle is made of high-quality Cr-V steel, known for its durability and corrosion resistance. The stainless steel casing of the 24 tooth ratchet and small torque wrench ensures long service life, high wear resistance, and environmental impact.

Bidirectional Function and Practical Application: The bicycle torque wrench has a 24 tooth ratchet and dual correction function, which can be used clockwise and counterclockwise. The car wheel torque wrench provide greater flexibility and application possibilities, such as when installing and removing screws and nuts in enclosed spaces.

Stability: Compact size and comfortable handle With a length of 420mm, the DEKOPRO torque wrench auto is compact and handy. The slim handle has an anti-slip surface that ensures a secure and comfortable grip. Torque Wrenches make work easier and reduce physical effort.

Easy to Understand: The precise scale and high readability of the DEKOPRO torque ratchet are represented by dual scales in Ftlb and Nm, with clear laser perforation markings. Allow for precise and easy adjustment of the required torque, even in low light conditions.
